title: MedPlus South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: MedPlus South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus South Asia Partners in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus South Asia Partners:
MedPlus South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
